Prominent Industrial Leasehold Site

83-87 Port Road, Whangarei

NZD $2,150,000

Property details

Prominently positioned directly opposite the Okara Shopping Complex, this high-profile site offers exceptional presence and long-term development potential.

Located within the Waterfront Zone, the property benefits from flexible zoning provisions that allow for a diverse mix of uses, including residential apartments and commercial activities.

Council plans provide for the continuation of the Hatea Loop walkway along the river edge to the rear of the property, enhancing connectivity, amenity and future value.

Established tenants include O’Brien Plumbing and Viridian Glass, providing immediate income.

The sale includes a well-performing self-storage business comprising 18 containers, currently operating at approximately 90% occupancy.

Photo Gallery

Highlights

  • ✓Opposite Okara Shopping Complex
  • ✓Flexible zoning with mixed-use potential
  • ✓Immediate income from established tenants
  • ✓Self-storage business with strong occupancy

Property Details

  • Floor Area980m²
  • Land Area1703m²
